titleStmt.title: SII 42.47: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 47. (A.R. No. B. 69 of 1953-54.) Chējarla, Atmakur Taluk, Nellore District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab in front of the Chennakēśava temple.

Dated in Śaka 16[1]9, Īśvara, Jyēshṭha, ba. 30, Bhṛiguvāra, solar eclipse. There was no solar eclipse in Jyēshṭha, nor was ba. 30, a Friday. Two solar eclipses occurred in this year in Chaitra and Āśvīja months. The corresponding date could be 1697 A.D., June 8 (no eclipse; Tuesday).

Records grants to the temple of Chennakēśava of Cheṁjerla and to Nāgāvojhula-Timmāvojhulu by Vēmā reḍḍi of Sarvapalli who bore the title Hindurāyasuratrāṇa. (Published in Inscriptions of Nellore District, Part-I, Atmakuru, No. 23).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Figures of sun, conch, tīrunāmam, discus and crescent-moon.

svasti śrī śubha śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbhulu (varṣaṁbulu) 1619
Agunēṁṭi yī(Ī)śvara saṁvatsara jēṣṭa(ṣṭha) ba 30 bhṛguvāra sūrya
grahaṇa puṇyakālamaṁdunu śrīI(hiṁ)durāvu(ya) suratrāṇa
sarvapalli vēmāreḍikaṁgāru ceṁjerla ceṁnnakēśava
dēvunikinni ye(ya)juśśākha kauṇya(ṇḍi)ṇya(nya) gōtraṁ nāgā
vojhula timmāvojhalakunnu dhāravōśi(si) yiccina
dharmmaśāsanaṁ . vu(U)dayagiri rājyaṁlōnu māku
nāyaṁkarānaku cellivaccē cējerlalōni
ra mali ta
layina

śrī Aṣṭabhōga tējasvāmyālunnu Anubha
viṁcuvāṁḍaU(vāṁḍu) dēvuni sagamunnu dēvu
ni tirumahōtsavaṁ sāgiṁcēdi . yī(Ī)dha
rmānaku ya(E)vvaru ganaka tappinānu ga
ṁga ka brāṁhmaninni caṁpina
pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru . svadattā dvigu
ṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . para
dattāpahārēṇa svadattā niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
[Ēkai]va bhaginī lōkē sarvēṣāmēva bhūbhṛtāṁ .
na bhōjyā na karagrāhyā vipradattā va
suṁdharāṁ
Anubhaviṁcu(ce)
daru śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 42.47 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
